ab: Vintia asapu cu aku mahlava siasuhlatʉ, acahli u i pauhli ihlaku?
ch: W:Vintia，我忘了帶筆，你可以借我嗎?
en: Vintia, I forgot to bring my pen. Can you lend me one?

ab: uka’a ku mʉmʉa, Apʉisa kani’ina.
en: I don’t have one either. This is Apʉ’s.

ab: hla acahli i pauhli aku mu’alivatʉ, makacani aku apuaili ihlau.
ch: W:那可以借我一下子嗎?我很快就還你。
en: Can you lend me the pen for a second? I will return to you immediately.

ab: a’ʉ, alʉmau.
en: Sure, take it.

ab: ’ʉ’ʉraisa, tumalʉlʉvʉaku sia’ʉ’ʉraisa mʉmʉa Apʉna.
en: Thank you and thank Apʉ for me.

ab: tumua i misaini?
en: May I help you?

ab: tumua ku apuaili usua tʉpʉhlana suhlatʉ kani’ina.
en: I want to return these two books.

ab: a’ʉ, marumana i misaini?
en: No problem and what else do you need?

ab: tumua ku mana umuhli utulu tʉpʉhlana suhlatʉ kani’ina.
en: I would like to borrow these three books.

ab: tuahlisa cu, atʉhlʉngʉ alʉ apuaili utulu ari mulavaʉ.
ch: A:好了。記得三天後要拿來還。
en: Sure and remember to return them after three days.

ab: kunau apuaili siasamusu ku.
en: You haven’t returned me the eraser.

ab: apuaili cu aku kiira.
en: I returned it yesterday.

ab: tiaraisa maruka cu siasamusu ku.
ch: M:那我的橡皮擦怎麼不見了。
en: Then, why is my eraser missing?

ab: ku u i umuhli cu a Vintia.
en: Did you lend it to Vintia?

ab: kuaku acahlia. musa ku pakisuahlai kana’ana.
en: I don’t know. I will go and ask her.

ab: mualualu umuhli ihlau siasamusu ku.
en: I will lend you my eraser first.

ab: Apʉ paritatʉpʉhla kani’i hliumuhli i Vintia ihlau?
en: Apʉ, did Vintia lend you this coat?

ab: ku hlipu’a inaku uvura ihlaku kani’i.
ch: W:不是，這是我媽媽買給我的。
en: No, my mom bought it for me.

ab: maraiahlʉ paritatʉpʉhlaisa Vintiana ihlau.
en: Vintia’s coat is the same as yours.

ab: malicʉcʉ a paritatʉpʉhla isa, kuparaiahlʉ tapaʉ a mu.
ch: W:他的外套是黑色的，我們的顏色不一樣。
en: His coat is black, so our colors are different.

ab: Apʉ, hliumuhli i vahlituku Vintiana ihlau?
en: Apʉ, did you borrow money from Vintia?

ab: maru, mairahlu ku apuaili isana arinani, asapu cu ku mahlava vahlituku.
ch: W:有，我本來今天要還他，我忘記帶錢了。
en: Yes, I was supposed to return to him today, but I forgot to bring the money.

ab: hla cuhlaumangi u apuaili?
en: Then, when will you return the money?

ab: apuaili isana ku matata
en: I will return to him tomorrow.

ab: a’ʉ, tumalʉlʉvi aku ihlau kihlamuhlamu Vintiana.
en: Okay, I will tell Vintia for you.
